data.name: Line's Guarder
data.detailed_description:
This is a small fast-paced single-player FPS game.

Gameplay

  • A stylized map.
  • Battle mode and zombie mode.
  • 10 minutes of fast game experience per game.
  • A variety of character clothing to choose from.
data.about_the_game:
This is a small fast-paced single-player FPS game.

Gameplay

  • A stylized map.
  • Battle mode and zombie mode.
  • 10 minutes of fast game experience per game.
  • A variety of character clothing to choose from.
data.short_description: AI robots launched an attack on humans, and the brave girls took up weapons to defend the defense line, for the humans! — A small fast-paced stand-alone FPS game, with a battle mode and a zombie mode, each game takes 10 minutes, and a variety of character costumes are available.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 波蘭文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i5 Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 2060
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
